result.summary: Found 4 visual issues on the page, primarily related to content being clipped or truncated at the right edge without clear scroll affordance indicators.

issues.description: Game cards in both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are cut off on the right edge (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUNC MI...', 'HYPERC...', 'DAR WATE...'). There are no visible scroll arrows or indicators to show users the content is horizontally scrollable.
issues.suggestion: Add visible horizontal scroll arrows or a 'swipe' affordance indicator so users understand the rows are scrollable. Alternatively, ensure card text and images are not abruptly clipped without a clear visual cue.

issues.description: The navigation tab 'Hot Gam' is truncated at the right edge of the screen with no visual scroll indicator, making it unclear to users that there are more navigation options available.
issues.suggestion: Add a fade gradient or arrow icon at the right edge of the navigation bar to signal that more tabs are available via horizontal scrolling.

issues.description: Game titles in the right-side partially visible cards are unreadable (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO', 'MUNC MI'), providing no useful information and appearing visually broken rather than intentional peek-scrolling.
issues.suggestion: Ensure at least the first word or a recognizable portion of the game title is visible, or use a consistent card peek width so partial cards look intentional.

issues.description: The bottom navigation bar icons have inconsistent visual weight — the active 'Casino' tab uses an orange cherry icon style that differs significantly in style from the other navigation icons, creating a visually inconsistent tab bar.
issues.suggestion: Standardize the icon style and size across all bottom navigation items for visual consistency.
